description: SNCF Connect is SNCF’s online travel booking service for train tickets and related trip services in France and Europe. It provides customer account features and partnership/affiliation programs around its travel offers.
summary: sncf-connect.com publicly exposes a documented partner HTTP API page, but no machine-readable API spec, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI could be confirmed from public documentation; authentication details for the partner API are not publicly described.
